message:
feat(test-utils): add deterministic runtime controls (bd-1vr1.4)

Add createIdGenerator, installDeterministicIds (crypto.randomUUID),
createSeededRandom (xoshiro128**), installSeededRandom (Math.random)
for flake-free tests without mock.module. 9 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
